label: PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning

node.label: PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning
node.definition: PDDL, STRIPS, and hierarchical task-network planning represent actions with preconditions and effects, then search for a valid plan from an initial state to a goal.
node.why_it_matters: The role of PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning is to connect Task decomposition & hierarchical reasoning, Discrete mathematics & logic to downstream capabilities including Formal verification of agents & plans.
examples: substrate for Formal verification of agents & plans
combined with Task decomposition & hierarchical reasoning
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Task decomposition & hierarchical reasoning, Discrete mathematics & logic.

dependencies.rationale: PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning uses Task decomposition & hierarchical reasoning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning uses Discrete mathematics & logic as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
PDDL, STRIPS & hierarchical task-network planning uses Graph search, BFS/DFS & A* as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
